Dash.name: Bull Rush
Dash.description: Dash forward and attack with knockback.

Dash2.description: Dash forward and attack with knockback. Repeat this if you hit something.

Spin2.description: Attack everything around you in a wide area 3 times.

FirePunch.name: Fire Punch
FirePunch.description: A melee attack that inflicts Burn 3.

FirePunch2.description: A melee attack that inflicts more Burn the more [img:str] you have.

IcePunch.name: Ice Punch
IcePunch.description: A melee attack that inflicts Freeze.

IcePunch2.description: A much stronger melee attack that inflicts Freeze.

ThunderPunch.name: Thunder Punch
ThunderPunch.description: A melee attack that has a 25% chance to inflict Stun.

ThunderPunch2.description: A melee attack that inflicts Stun.

FurySwipes.name: Fury Swipes
FurySwipes.description: A weak melee attack that has a chance to hit multiple times.

FurySwipes2.description: A melee attack that has a chance to hit multiple times.

SideSlash.name: Side Slash
SideSlash.description: An attack that hits a half circle around you.

SideSlash2.description: An attack that hits a half circle around you and inflicts Bruise.

FighterLeap.name: Leap
FighterLeap.description: Jump to an open tile within range, then inflict Bruise on all adjacent units.

FighterLeap2.description: Jump to an open tile within range, then damage and inflict Bruise on all adjacent units.

Uppercut.name: Uppercut
Uppercut.description: Punch a unit into the air, lobbing it back 3 tiles.

Uppercut2.description:
Punch a unit into the air, lobbing it back 3 tiles.
Refresh your movement action.

Counter.name: Counter
Counter.description: Counterattack all attacks until your next turn.

Counter2.name: Counter
Counter2.description: Preemptively counterattack all attacks until your next turn.

TailWhip.name: Tail Whip
TailWhip.description: An attack that hits 2 tiles in front of and behind you.

TailWhip2.description: An attack that hits 4 tiles in front of and behind you.

Poke.name: Poke
Poke.description: A melee attack that deals 1 damage.

Poke2.description:
A melee attack that deals 1 damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Nip2.description: Deal 1 damage and inflict Bruise on a unit.

Push2.description: Turn an adjacent unit around and knock it back 2 tiles.

FalconPunch.name: Falcon Punch
FalconPunch.description:
Charge up a mega punch.
[s:.7](This punch will be unleashed on your next turn.)[/s]
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

FalconPunch2.name: Falcon Punch
FalconPunch2.description:
Charge up a mega dash attack.
[s:.7](This punch will be unleashed on your next turn.)[/s]
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Exert.name: Exert
Exert.description:
Refresh your basic attack and movement action.
Fall asleep at the end of the turn.

Exert2.name: Exert
Exert2.description:
Refresh your basic attack and movement action.
Gain +2 [img:str] and +4 [img:spd] until end of turn.
Fall asleep at the end of the turn.

Enrage2.description: Give a unit on any tile +4 [img:str] and Confusion 2.

Confront.name: Confront
Confront.description: Move in front of an enemy.

Confront2.description:
Move in front of an enemy.
Your next action has +30% critical chance.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Juiced.name: Juiced
Juiced.description: Your movement range is doubled until the end of the turn.

Juiced2.description: Your movement range is doubled and you get +4 [img:str] until the end of the turn.

CosmicPunch.name: Cosmic Punch
CosmicPunch.description:
Punch a unit into SPACE!
[s:.7]They will fall back down at the end of the round.[/s]

CosmicPunch2.description:
Punch a unit into SPACE!
[s:.7]They will fall back down at the end of the round.
(This spell costs less.)[/s]

FighterTaunt.name: Taunt!
FighterTaunt.description: All enemies within 3 tiles move toward you.

FighterTaunt2.description: All enemies within 5 tiles move toward you.

GravitySlam.name: Gravity Slam
GravitySlam.description: Jump to a tile and pull enemies toward you when you land.

GravitySlam2.description:
Jump to a tile and pull enemies toward you when you land.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Berserk.name: Berserk
Berserk.description: Gain +5 [img:str] and Bruise 5. This ability becomes Berserker Dash.

Berserk2.description: Gain +7 [img:str] and Bruise 3. This ability becomes Berserker Dash+.

BerserkDash2.description: A dash attack with infinite range.

Challenge.name: Mock
Challenge.description:
Force a unit to move towards you.
RELOAD: Kill something.

Challenge2.description:
Force a unit to move towards you.
RELOAD: Kill something.
Bonus Ability: Slap.

Slap.name: Slap
Slap.description:
A weak melee attack.
RELOAD: Kill something.

Stoopzerk.name: Stoopzerk
Stoopzerk.description:
Your [img:int] becomes 0. You can attack an extra time each turn for the rest of the battle.
This ability becomes MORE ANGRIER!!!

Stoopzerk2.description:
Your [img:int] becomes 0. You can attack an extra time each turn for the rest of the battle.
This ability becomes MORE ANGRIER!!!+

LastThought.name: MORE ANGRIER!!!
LastThought.description: Lose all of your mana and gain that much [img:str] until the end of the turn.

LastThought2.description: Lose all of your mana and gain that much [img:str], [img:dex], and [img:spd] until the end of the turn.

SleeperHold.name: Sleeper Hold
SleeperHold.description: Inflict Sleep on an adjacent unit.

SleeperHold2.description: Inflict Sleep and Bruise on an adjacent unit.

Grapple.name: Grapple
Grapple.description: Immobilize an adjacent unit for as long as you remain adjacent.

Grapple2.description:
Immobilize an adjacent unit for as long as you remain adjacent.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ThinkTooHard.name: Think Too Hard
ThinkTooHard.description:
Take damage equal to your [img:int].
The next spell you cast this turn is free.

ThinkTooHard2.description:
Take damage equal to your [img:int], then your [img:int] becomes 0.
The next spell you cast this turn is free.

Zoomzerk.name: Zoomzerk
Zoomzerk.description:
Your movement action becomes a dash attack.
This ability becomes Reposition.

Zoomzerk2.description:
Your movement action becomes a dash attack. Restore all your mana.
This ability becomes Reposition+.

FighterBonusThrow.name: Throw Weapon
FighterBonusThrow.description:
Throw your weapon at a unit. The weapon breaks.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Bloodzerk.name: Bloodzerk
Bloodzerk.description:
Drop to 1 HP.
Damage you deal to bleeding units has Lifesteal.
This spell becomes Lacerate.

Bloodzerk2.description:
Drop to 1 HP.
Damage you deal to bleeding units has Lifesteal.
This spell becomes Lacerate+.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

Lacerate.name: Lacerate
Lacerate.description: A melee attack that inflicts Bleed 2.

Lacerate2.description: A stronger melee attack that inflicts Bleed 2.

ExhaustingBlow.name: Exhausting Blow
ExhaustingBlow.description:
Dash forward one tile and attack with knockback.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost increases by 2 at the end of each of your turns.)[/s]

ExhaustingBlow2.description:
Dash forward any number of tiles and attack with knockback.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost increases by 2 at the end of each of your turns.)[/s]

ChaosRampage.name: Chaos Rampage
ChaosRampage.description:
Take an extra turn. You have Madness 1 and Confusion 1 on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

ChaosRampage2.name: Chaos Rampage
ChaosRampage2.description:
Take an extra turn. You have Madness 1 on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

MeteorSlam.name: Meteor Slam
MeteorSlam.description:
Jump up to 2 tiles.
Damage, knockback, and inflict Burn 3 on the unit you land on and all adjacent units.
[s:.7](Adjacent units take half damage.)[/s]

MeteorSlam2.description:
Jump up to 5 tiles.
Damage, knockback, and inflict Burn 3 on the unit you land on and all adjacent units.

MuscleMemory.name: Muscle Memory
MuscleMemory.description:
A melee attack that deals 8 damage.
[s:.7](This spell's damage is reduced by 1 and mana cost is reduced by 2 each time it's cast.)[/s]

MuscleMemory2.description:
A melee attack that deals 8 damage and inflicts Bruise.
[s:.7](This spell's damage is reduced by 1 and mana cost is reduced by 2 each time it's cast.)[/s]

Inhale.name: Inhale
Inhale.description: Suck all units in a straight line 1 tile toward you.

Inhale2.description: Suck all units in a straight line 3 tiles toward you.

OneTwoPunch.name: One-Two Punch
OneTwoPunch.description: A melee attack that hits twice. Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.

OneTwoPunch2.description: A melee attack that hits thrice! Each punch inflicts Bruise 1.

TeamSpin.name: Synchro Spin
TeamSpin.description: You and each allied cat do a spin attack at the same time.

TeamSpin2.description:
You and each allied cat do a spin attack at the same time.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

TeamFlex.name: Flex Off
TeamFlex.description: You and each allied cat gain +2 [img:shield] and knockback adjacent units 2 tiles.

TeamFlex2.description: You and each allied cat gain +2 [img:shield], +2 temporary Brace, and knockback adjacent units 2 tiles.

Huddle.name: Huddle
Huddle.description: You and each allied cat give adjacent units +1 Damage and +2 [img:spd].

Huddle2.description:
You and each allied cat give adjacent units +1 Damage and +2 [img:spd].
[s:.7](This spell is free the first time it's cast each battle.)[/s]

RagePunch.name: Rage Punch
RagePunch.description: A melee attack that increases its damage by 1 each time you take damage.

RagePunch2.description:
A melee attack that increases its damage by 1 each time you take damage.
[s:.7](This spell starts at 5 damage.)[/s]

BreakingPoint.name: Breaking Point
BreakingPoint.description:
Deal damage, knockback, and knockback damage equal to your [img:str].
Reduce this spell's mana cost by 1 each time you take damage.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

BreakingPoint2.description:
Deal damage, knockback, and knockback damage equal to your [img:str].
Reduce this spell's mana cost by 2 each time you take damage.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

AssertDominance.name: Assert Dominance
AssertDominance.description: A weak melee attack. If this kills anything, you become the Alpha. If you are the Alpha, this spell deals 5 additional damage and inflicts Bruise.

AssertDominance2.description: A weak melee attack. If this kills anything, you become the Alpha and gain +2 [img:str]. If you are the Alpha, this spell deals 5 additional damage and inflicts Bruise.

DumbMove.name: 1D Chess
DumbMove.description: Move toward the closest enemy. The dumber you are, the farther you move.

DumbMove2.description:
Move toward the closest enemy. The dumber you are, the farther you move.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

SuckerPunch.name: Sucker Punch
SuckerPunch.description: The next time an enemy moves through an adjacent tile, cancel its movement and attack it.

SuckerPunch2.description:
The next time an enemy moves through an adjacent tile, cancel its movement and attack it.
Bonus Passive: While it's not your turn, your basic attack inflicts Bruise 2.

Stick.name: Stick!
Stick.description:
Equip a temporary Stick!
[s:.7](Your weapon slot must be empty.)[/s]

Stick2.description:
Equip a temporary Stick! Maybe even a big one?
[s:.7](Your weapon slot must be empty.)[/s]
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Hurl.name: Hurl
Hurl.description: Toss an adjacent unit at a random unit.

Hurl2.description:
Toss an adjacent unit at a random unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BigPunch.name: Big Punch
BigPunch.description:
A melee attack.
This spell's mana cost increases by 2 each time it's cast.

BigPunch2.description:
A melee attack.
This spell's mana cost increases by 1 each time it's cast.

Pawbreaker.name: Paw Breaker
Pawbreaker.description: A huge punch that breaks your paw... (You get -1 [img:str] permanently.)

Pawbreaker2.description: A huge punch that inflicts Bruise and Stun, and breaks your paw... (You get -1 [img:str] permanently.)

Ram.name: Ram
Ram.description: Knock back a unit 4 tiles, then dash forward and attack it.

Ram2.description: Knock back a unit 10 tiles, then dash forward and attack it.
